### Modified files (5)
- **`packages/shared/package.json`** — Add `"./theme"` subpath export.
- **`apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`** — Rewrites the existing `useSyncExternalStore` hook to use `ThemeId` instead of `"light"|"dark"|"system"`. Migrates old stored values on first read. **Preserves `resolvedTheme: "light"|"dark"`** so all 4 existing callers (`DiffWorkerPoolProvider`, `DiffPanel`, `ChatMarkdown`, `ChatView`) need zero changes. Also preserves `.dark` class toggling for Tailwind utilities and `ThreadTerminalDrawer`.
- **`apps/web/src/index.css`** — Appends 3 `:root[data-theme="..."]` blocks after the existing `:root {}`. Specificity (0,1,1) beats the existing `@variant dark` by cascade order. The existing `@variant dark` is kept intact.
- **`apps/web/src/routes/__root.tsx`** — Wraps root view in `<ThemeProvider>`.
- **`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`** — Replaces old light/dark/system radio buttons with `<ThemeSelector />`.

content.text:
All 9 tasks complete. Here's a summary of every change made:

---

## What was implemented

### New files (3)

**`packages/shared/src/theme.ts`** — Pure TypeScript theme types and constants. Exports `ThemeId` (`"t3-dark" | "t3-light" | "t3-midnight"`), `ThemeColors`, `Theme` interface, the three built-in theme constants (`T3_DARK_THEME`, `T3_LIGHT_THEME`, `T3_MIDNIGHT_THEME`), `BUILT_IN_THEMES`, `DEFAULT_THEME_ID`, `isThemeId()`, and `getThemeById()`. Zero Effect.js dependencies.

**`apps/web/src/components/ThemeProvider.tsx`** — Thin semantic wrapper that subscribes to the theme hook, ensuring DOM stays synced through the React lifecycle. Added to `__root.tsx` around the entire app.

**`apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx`** — Radio group of theme cards, each with a mini color swatch (sidebar strip, editor area, status bar strip, accent dot) using the representative hex colors from each `Theme`. Matches the existing settings radio button visual style.

### Modified files (5)

**`packages/shared/package.json`** — Added `"./theme"` subpath export pointing to `src/theme.ts`.

**`apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`** — Rewrote with `ThemeId` instead of `"light"|"dark"|"system"`. Migrates old stored values on first read (`"light"` → `"t3-light"`, everything else → `"t3-dark"`). `applyTheme()` now sets the `data-theme` attribute AND toggles `.dark` for Tailwind compatibility. **`resolvedTheme: "light"|"dark"` is preserved**, so `DiffWorkerPoolProvider`, `DiffPanel`, `ChatMarkdown`, and `ChatView` are untouched.

**`apps/web/src/routes/__root.tsx`** — Added `<ThemeProvider>` wrapper around the root view.

**`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`** — Removed old `THEME_OPTIONS` radio group and `useTheme` import; replaced the Appearance section with `<ThemeSelector />`.

**`apps/web/src/index.css`** — Added four `--theme-sidebar/editor/terminal/status-bar` defaults to `:root`, then appended three `:root[data-theme="t3-light|t3-dark|t3-midnight"]` blocks. Each has full color variable overrides plus theme-specific surface tokens. T3 Midnight uses a deep blue-black palette distinct from T3 Dark.

All 9 tasks complete. Here's a summary of every change made:

---

## What was implemented

### New files (3)

**`packages/shared/src/theme.ts`** — Pure TypeScript theme types and constants. Exports `ThemeId` (`"t3-dark" | "t3-light" | "t3-midnight"`), `ThemeColors`, `Theme` interface, the three built-in theme constants (`T3_DARK_THEME`, `T3_LIGHT_THEME`, `T3_MIDNIGHT_THEME`), `BUILT_IN_THEMES`, `DEFAULT_THEME_ID`, `isThemeId()`, and `getThemeById()`. Zero Effect.js dependencies.

**`apps/web/src/components/ThemeProvider.tsx`** — Thin semantic wrapper that subscribes to the theme hook, ensuring DOM stays synced through the React lifecycle. Added to `__root.tsx` around the entire app.

**`apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx`** — Radio group of theme cards, each with a mini color swatch (sidebar strip, editor area, status bar strip, accent dot) using the representative hex colors from each `Theme`. Matches the existing settings radio button visual style.

### Modified files (5)

**`packages/shared/package.json`** — Added `"./theme"` subpath export pointing to `src/theme.ts`.

**`apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`** — Rewrote with `ThemeId` instead of `"light"|"dark"|"system"`. Migrates old stored values on first read (`"light"` → `"t3-light"`, everything else → `"t3-dark"`). `applyTheme()` now sets the `data-theme` attribute AND toggles `.dark` for Tailwind compatibility. **`resolvedTheme: "light"|"dark"` is preserved**, so `DiffWorkerPoolProvider`, `DiffPanel`, `ChatMarkdown`, and `ChatView` are untouched.

**`apps/web/src/routes/__root.tsx`** — Added `<ThemeProvider>` wrapper around the root view.

**`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`** — Removed old `THEME_OPTIONS` radio group and `useTheme` import; replaced the Appearance section with `<ThemeSelector />`.

**`apps/web/src/index.css`** — Added four `--theme-sidebar/editor/terminal/status-bar` defaults to `:root`, then appended three `:root[data-theme="t3-light|t3-dark|t3-midnight"]` blocks. Each has full color variable overrides plus theme-specific surface tokens. T3 Midnight uses a deep blue-black palette distinct from T3 Dark.
